required_outputs.description: Record-by-record consent ledger risk, margin, classification, remediation-combination, citation, formula, budget, and +/-5% sensitivity table.
Concise signoff memo with packet-only inputs, formulas, assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, unresolved needs_review items, and final decision table.

supporting_outputs.description: Executable reproduction script that uses only embedded packet constants and regenerates the CSV and governance note.

validation.notes: All calculations use only the embedded packet. The observed_risk_score formula, state-code semantics, and O3 interpretation are explicitly marked needs_review because the packet does not define them.
validation.structured_validation_result: validation_ok rows=24 records=4 option_sets=6 all_pass=true ambiguity_marked=needs_review
